Bug / Task Description: Map.PrefixMatches in internal/treemap/treemap.go returns every stored key beginning with the supplied prefix, relying on sorted keys so matches form one contiguous run starting at the first key not less than the prefix. The scan currently begins one position too late, so when a key equals the prefix exactly (or is the first match) it is skipped and omitted; other matching keys are still returned, making the omission easy to miss.
Commit Subject: fix(treemap): include exact prefix key in PrefixMatches
